rationale: The cited 2008 JMKR paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core question: both study acquisition channel differences (WOM/referred vs marketing/nonreferred) and downstream value via additional referrals/WOM effects. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior work that valued referred/WOM-acquired customers, and the cited note provides a foundational dynamic customer-equity approach with indirect WOM spillovers, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
